title: Trump's pick to lead DHS clears key hurdle with help of Democrat
shortDescription: A key Senate panel advanced Republican Sen. Markwayne Mullin's nomination to lead DHS, putting him on a glide path to confirmation.

title: FBI investigating former Trump official Joe Kent
shortDescription: Former counterterrorism director Joe Kent is under FBI investigation for reportedly leaking classified information. Sources said the investigation began before his resignation in protest of the war.

title: Trump urged Israel-Iran to exercise restraint
shortDescription: Israel bombed Iran’s massive Pars natural gas field, causing oil prices to jump and setting a new benchmark in the U.S.-Israeli war.

title: Hegseth wants billions more for Iran war as Trump makes new threats
shortDescription: Gas prices hit an average of $3.90 a gallon nationwide and global oil prices surged after Israel attacked a critical Iranian natural gas field.

title: Trump religious liberty commissioner says Israel views got her fired
shortDescription: Carrie Prejean Boller said she was removed from the Religious Liberty Commission because she did not reflect the administration's positions on Israel.

title: What is Donald Trump's approval rating? See latest polls
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has long been a polarizing figure, with the vast majority of Democrats disapproving of his job peformance. How many approve?

title: Kansas tested a version of Trump’s SAVE Act. Chaos ensued.
shortDescription: As the Senate considers President Donald Trump's stringent anti-voter fraud measure, legal experts say Kansas's offers a troubling case study.

title: This 'Real Housewives' star says she could 'throw down' in Congress
shortDescription: "The TSA lines are ridiculous," the "Beverly Hills" star told USA TODAY, lamenting the monthlong shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security.

title: 'Blame the Democrats.' Republicans share videos from Atlanta airport
shortDescription: National Republicans are sharing videos from inside the Atlanta airport blaming the partial government shutdown on Democrats. Long lines continue.

title: See Rep. Summer Lee’s time in Congress
shortDescription: Summer Lee is a Democratic U.S. House member for Pennsylvania’s 12th District, covering parts of Pittsburgh and Allegheny County elected in 2022.

title: What did Trump say about Joe Kent, the official who resigned over Iran?
shortDescription: Head of the U.S. National Counterterrorism Center Joe Kent resigned over the war in Iran. President Donald Trump called him 'weak on security.'
